name: @fuertesito/insider-signal-mcp
description: Insider Signal Tracker & Valuation Agent - MCP App Server

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && cross-env INPUT=views/signal-scanner.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=views/valuation-card.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=views/cluster-detail.html vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/server.js --external:@modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external:@modelcontextprotocol/ext-apps --external:zod && esbuild main.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --external:@modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external:@modelcontextprotocol/ext-apps --external:cors --external:express --external:zod --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node"
scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "npm run watch" "npm run serve:http"
scripts.start:http: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build && npm run serve:http
scripts.start:stdio: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build 1>&2 && npm run serve:stdio
